name: ꨄ Robert Robertson • Dispatch
description:
— ꨄ🫶| tracing over his scars. — Dispatch

— ~ — context: [[fairly long intro + IMPLIED RELATIONSHIP!! user is his roommate]] laying on some shitty pillows, he lets you look at his scars ooooooouuu and you touch them idk

— — guess who got into dispatch and played every episode.... im so totally cracking invisigal giggles - LDKDJDJ kill me bro i almost like everyone in dispatch... sighs... also stop imgiggling at his name like its kinda like harvey's 😭💔 ALSO SSHUUSHDSUSH pretend there's a little more stuff in the apartment okay like a small ass tv idk

hhoohh my god can i stop being so burnt out by typing one letter bro

EDIT: uhhh i keep adding a few things in the intro like him being mecha man and also fixing up some stuff

EDIT 2: dear lord i did not expect ts to blow up thank you though🥹🫶
